task.title: Fix chat route to use graph-interpreter (enables AGENT_URL backend agent flow)

context.project: Chatbot-temp — React + Hono + MongoDB chat UI with graph-based backend agent
context.problem: The chat route at backend/src/routes/chat.ts currently calls Gemini DIRECTLY with getGeminiAnswer(userText), bypassing the graph-interpreter service entirely. This means: 1. The backend agent (AGENT_URL) is NEVER called from this route 2. Without GEMINI_API_KEY, it returns 502 error instead of raw agent response 3. Conversation history is NOT forwarded to the agent 4. Image support is NOT wired up in this route
context.solution: Refactor the chat route to use interpretGraph() from graph-interpreter.ts instead of direct Gemini calls. This enables the full pipeline: AGENT_URL → graph data → Gemini interpretation → natural text. It also enables the existing bypass: when GEMINI_API_KEY is missing, raw agent JSON is returned to UI.

requirements.req: Replace direct getGeminiAnswer() call with interpretGraph() from graph-interpreter
Load conversation history from MongoDB and pass it to interpretGraph()
Keep the existing user message persistence logic unchanged
Handle errors properly: 502 for agent errors, preserve existing error format
Remove unused imports: GoogleGenerativeAI, the geminiModel, getGeminiAnswer function
Remove the entire TEMPLATE rollback block (commented-out code) — it is dead weight
Do NOT change any other routes or files

implementation-details.detail: Load history: const history = await Message.find({ conversationId: convId }).sort({ createdAt: 1 }).lean()
Filter history: exclude the current user message we just saved (filter by createdAt >= now or by id)
Call: const answer = await interpretGraph(userText, historyItems, convId)
HistoryItems type: Array<{ role: 'user' | 'assistant', content: string }>

constraints.constraint: Do NOT modify any other route files
Do NOT change API response format — must still return { role: 'assistant', content: answer, title: conv.title }
Keep the file under 200 lines after changes

verification.step: Run: cd backend && npm run build — must compile without errors
Run: cd backend && npx tsc --noEmit — no type errors
Verify: Without GEMINI_API_KEY, returns raw JSON string from agent
